description_long: This is a modern, compact rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a detachable box magazine and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel. The rifle has a collapsible stock at the rear, allowing for adjustable length and improved portability in urban environments. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, suitable for mounting various optics or accessories, though no advanced sighting system is currently attached. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. The handguard is streamlined and minimal, contributing to the weapon's lightweight appearance. The overall design suggests a tactical firearm optimized for maneuverability and low visibility.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a suppressor, collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, suppressor, pistol grip, and magazine clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's circular end and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the ejection port and magazine release more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the slim, linear alignment of the rifle's body.
